scheme_name: Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction
page_title: Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction

details: The “Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide landowners in Haridwar district with model maps for residential construction according to the size of their plots.
benefits: Model maps for residential construction are provided to all landowners across Haridwar district.
eligibility: All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.

online: For the convenience of landowners in Haridwar district, model maps have been uploaded on the authority’s website. Landowners can select a model map according to the area of their plot and avail the facility.

documents_required: The required documents must be submitted as per the guidelines of the Haridwar-Roorkee Development Authority.

faqs.question: Who can benefit from this scheme?
faqs.answer: All landowners in Haridwar district are eligible to use the model maps provided under this scheme.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme aims to assist landowners by providing ready-made model maps for residential construction suitable for their plot size.

faqs.question: How can landowners access the model maps?
faqs.answer: Model maps have been uploaded on the Haridwar-Roorkee Development Authority website, and landowners can download them directly.

faqs.question: Can a landowner select a map according to their plot area?
faqs.answer: Yes, landowners can select a model map based on the size of their plot.

faqs.question: Can commercial or non-residential construction use these maps?
faqs.answer: No, these model maps are specifically for residential construction only.
